title: Gentle Discipline
description: Training the mind as an ally — practice without self-hatred, contentment without complacency.
entry_queries: I can't stick to a practice
how do I train my mind

steps.practice: Interrupt one self-degrading habit today with one concrete uplifting replacement.
steps.reflection: In what way is my own mind currently acting as my enemy — and what would friendship with myself look like?

steps.practice: When the mind attacks, answer with one firm kind instruction — then take one aligned action.
steps.reflection: Is my mind currently friend or foe in this season of life?

steps.practice: Once today, choose contentment over comparison — name one thing that is enough for now.
steps.reflection: Where am I restless for more, when steady devotion asks for firm, quiet resolve?
